infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: eeatly uses your camera so you can snap a photo of a meal you cooked or a recipe card you want to save.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: eeatly reads photos so you can attach a meal photo or have AI extract a recipe from a saved image.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: eeatly uses the microphone so you can record a voice note describing a recipe.

plugins.photosPermission: eeatly reads photos so you can attach a meal photo or have AI extract a recipe from a saved image.
plugins.cameraPermission: eeatly uses your camera so you can snap a photo of a meal you cooked or a recipe card you want to save.

plugins.microphonePermission: eeatly uses the microphone so you can record a voice note describing a recipe.
